name: Rage Room
description: Uses Meta XR SDK and Unity to create a virutal "rage room" that allows players to destroy fragile goods in their room.

name: Violina
description: Made for DeltaHacks XII - Web app that detects and processes arm joints using MediaPipe's pose detection model to check good violin posture.

name: QuatroBeat
description: A 4-key rhythm game with four pre-made levels. Allows users to import their own songs and map their own levels. Built in 2 weeks for a high school project.

name: My Website
description: My personal website. You're looking at version 2!

name: Grocery Store Nightmare
description: A primitive "The Binding of Isaac" copy with stat upgrades, walking enemies, primitive room traversal, and player bullets. Built in 2 weeks for a high school project.

name: Paper Strings
description: Made for DeltaHacks XI - Uses your webcam to detect and feed hand joint data to a trained Keras model, returning its guess for the guitar chord hand shape the hand forms. Play the currently detected guitar chord by strumming.

name: GiftSpark
description: A full stack web app meant for planning birthdays! List details of your loved ones birthdays and get reminders for each as they approach. Built as a final group project for CS1XD3.
